REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, OTHER HMC ASSETS, LLC, SOLELY AS ADMINISTRATOR FOR DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED. DEMURRER TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF 12 CFR 1024.40 IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO SUBSTANTIVE OPPOSITION FILED. DEMURER TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR ELDER ABUSE TO THE EXTENT IT IS ASSERTED BY THE LLC IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFFS CITE NO AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT THIS CAUSE OF ACTION MAY BE BROUGHT BY AN LLC. DEMURRER IS OTHERWISE SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR EACH PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACTS IN SUPPORT OF EACH CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST EACH DEFENDANT. BASED ON THE ALLEGATIONS IN THE COMPLAINT PLAINTIFF CALEF HAS STANDING TO BRING CAUSES OF ACTION ASSERTED IN THE COMPLAINT AS A GUARANTOR. SEE DOT. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. FURTHER, WHILE PLAINTIFF APPEARED TO HAVE AGREED TO PAY CERTAIN AMOUNTS UNDER THE LOAN IN BANKRUPTCY, THE NATURE OF THAT AGREEMENT IS UNCLEAR, I.E. WAS PLAINTIFF AGREEING TO THE AMOUNT TO RESOLVE THE MATTER THROUGH BANKRUPTCY, WAS THE AGREEMENT MADE DUE TO RELIANCE ON THE AMOUNTS DEMANDED BY THE DEFENDANT, WAS THE AGREEMENT APPLICABLE TO ANY OTHER TYPES OF RESOLUTION, E.G. PAYMENT OUTSIDE OF BANKRUPTCY. THESE FACTUAL ISSUES CANNOT BE RESOLVED ON A DEMURRER. FURTHERMORE, THE COURT NOTES THAT IN PROVIDING THEIR CALCULATIONS REGARDING EXCESSIVE AMOUNT DEMANDED IN NOTS, PLAINTIFF DOES NOT ALLEGE THAT THE AMOUNT COULD NOT HAVE BEEN PROPERLY AND LEGALLY INCREASED DUE TO CHARGES OTHER THAN MISSED MONTHLY PAYMENTS, E.G. LATE FEES, ATTORNEY'S FEES ETC. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: N. WONG, NOT REPORTED (D501)

DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-28-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Courtcall:
Seth Cox, Esq., 310-640-3070, appearing for Civic Financial Services, Defendant
No other appearances.

Hearing held. Mr. Cox stated that he did not contest to the tentative ruling and that he did not receive any notice the opposing counsel was contesting either.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

OTHER HMC ASSETS, LLC, SOLELY AS ADMINISTRATOR FOR DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED. Demurrer to the cause of action for violation of 12 CFR 1024.40 is sustained without leave to amend. No substantive opposition filed. Demurer to the cause of action for Elder Abuse to the extent it is asserted by the LLC is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiffs cite no authority for the proposition that this cause of action may be brought by an LLC. Demurrer is otherwise sustained with leave to amend for each Plaintiff to allege facts in support of each cause of action against each defendant. Based on the allegations in the Complaint Plaintiff Calef has standing to bring causes of action asserted in the complaint as a guarantor. See DOT. Defendant's request for judicial notice is granted. Further, while Plaintiff appeared to have agreed to pay certain amounts under the loan in bankruptcy, the nature of that agreement is unclear, i.e. was Plaintiff agreeing to the amount to resolve the matter through bankruptcy, was the agreement made due to reliance on the amounts demanded by the defendant, was the agreement applicable to any other types of resolution, e.g. payment outside of bankruptcy. These factual issues cannot be resolved on a demurrer. Furthermore, the Court notes that in providing their calculations regarding excessive amount demanded in NOTS, Plaintiff does not allege that the amount could not have been properly and legally increased due to charges other than missed monthly payments, e.g. late fees, attorney's fees etc. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
